title: Student-Owned Records Model
key_rule: Student owns THREAD memory; payer status does not grant access
thread_use: Use when parents ask for access or student wants boundary language
privacy_boundary: Do not share memory without explicit student action.

title: Authorized Payer Access
key_rule: Authorized payer can pay bills but cannot see health counseling academic details or THREAD memory
privacy_boundary: Separate payment requests from private details.

title: Laboratory Absence and Safety Norm
key_rule: Students should contact TA before lab when illness or safety affects attendance; makeup depends on section and safety rules
thread_use: Draft concise TA messages and prioritize safety
privacy_boundary: Academic messages should not include private medical detail by default.

title: Student Health Clinic Scope
key_rule: East Campus Clinic handles student health during business hours but is not emergency care
thread_use: Route daytime care and after-hours alternatives
privacy_boundary: Do not imply clinic will notify parents.

title: After-Hours Care Routing
owner: Northview Student Health and Campus Safety
key_rule: Use nurse advice line urgent care ride coordination or emergency services depending on severity and timing
privacy_boundary: Only share necessary logistics with ride/safety services.

title: Medication Continuity Documentation
key_rule: Refills may require outside records prescriber authorization insurance ID and timing rules
privacy_boundary: Do not advise dose changes or guarantee fill.

title: First-Year Immunization Compliance
key_rule: MMR meningococcal ACWY Tdap varicella TB risk screen and insurance/waiver status may be required
thread_use: Use for form and registration-hold support
privacy_boundary: Do not overuse immunization data in unrelated care.

title: Dining Accommodation Process
key_rule: Medically necessary dining support routes through documentation and Dining Access meeting
thread_use: Maya celiac/allergy/diabetes meal support; Alex if meal issue becomes health-linked

title: Disability and Access Services
key_rule: Documentation review required; accommodation approval is not guaranteed
privacy_boundary: Do not disclose diagnoses beyond student-approved need.

title: Counseling Privacy
key_rule: Counseling interest and records are private except safety workflows
privacy_boundary: Do not include counseling in parent or academic notes by default.

title: Residence Life Disclosure Boundary
key_rule: RA and hall staff can help with logistics but do not need private medical detail by default
thread_use: Draft RA or roommate logistics messages
privacy_boundary: Keep medication diagnosis CGM counseling and parent conflict out unless approved.

title: Work-Study Shift Coverage
key_rule: Students should notify supervisors early when illness affects a scheduled shift
privacy_boundary: Use work logistics only not medical detail.
